[@PublicEvolving](<../../../../annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation interface in org.apache.flink.annotation") public abstract class OutputStreamBasedFileCompactor extends [Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Object.html> "class or interface in java.lang") implements [FileCompactor](<FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor")

Base class for [`FileCompactor`](<FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor") implementations that write the compacting file by a output stream.
